title: 16th Annual National Retail and Consumer Markets Summit
content:
## 16th Annual National Retail and Consumer Markets Summit
We are delighted to invite you to our 16th Annual National Retail and Consumer Markets Summit . Designed for legal counsel and business leaders, this year’s summit will feature the latest industry trends and legal developments in the sector. We will offer practical tips for addressing timely issues facing retailers and consumer-facing businesses today. There will be time for discussion at the end of each session and an opportunity to network with speakers and peers. Topics to be discussed include:
- Fireside Chat with Kim Furlong, President & CEO of the Retail Council of Canada
- Addressing CCAA and distress solutions in the Retail and Consumer Markets industry
- Tariffs and Trade: International trade and supply chain update
- Our Quick Takes: Key issues facing the industry in 2026 and beyond
Note: The presentation and networking opportunities will take place live in our Toronto, Montréal and Vancouver offices, and will also be available online. All instructions and information on how to access the webinar will be forwarded a few days before the event. If you have questions about this series, please contact clientevents@mccarthy.ca . This program qualifies for up to 3.25 hours of CPD credit under the mandatory education regimes in British Columbia and Ontario. Barreau du Québec Continuing Education: This program contains up to 3.25 hours of content. For more information regarding the declaration and recognition of educational activities, please contact the Barreau du Québec .
- Law Society of Ontario – Substantive
- Law Society of British Columbia – Substantive
